title: SEQUENCE output — dependency-legal ordered slice sequence

skeleton_ref.description: Path to 04-skeleton.json providing the designated skeleton.

slices_ref.description: Path to 02-slices.json providing candidate slice details.

verticality_ref.description: Path to 03-verticality.json providing eligible slice set.

verdict.description: sequenced = legal order produced; dependency_defect = cycle/dangling/skeleton-with-deps blocked it.

sequence.description: Ordered slices; positions ascending from 1 with no gaps; position 1 always skeleton:true. Empty when verdict:dependency_defect.

position.description: 1-based position in the sequence; ascending, no gaps.

id.description: Slice S* identifier carried verbatim from 02-slices.json.

skeleton.description: True only on position 1 (the designated walking skeleton); false elsewhere.

value.description: Value tier carried verbatim from 02-slices.json; never re-scored.

retires_risk.description: Risk retired, verbatim from 02-slices.json, or null.

depends_on.description: S* prerequisites carried verbatim from 02; every listed id must appear at an earlier position.

cost_proxy.description: len(requirements) + len(acceptance) from 02-slices.json; declared feature-depth proxy.

rationale.description: One line — why this slice sits at this position; caveman.

ordering_basis.description: Short caveman paragraph explaining the sequencing logic: skeleton pinned, dependency legality hard constraint, then value×risk/cost heuristic.

acyclic.description: True when no dependency cycles exist; false triggers dependency_defect verdict.

skeleton_is_root.description: True when skeleton slice carries no eligible-slice depends_on of its own.

cycles.description: Cycle paths when acyclic:false; empty on clean run.

dangling_depends_on.description: S* IDs referenced in depends_on but absent from the eligible slice set; empty on clean run.

coverage.description: Coverage accounting: sequenced set must equal eligible set on verdict:sequenced.

sequenced.description: Slice ids in emitted position order; equals eligible_slices as a set on verdict:sequenced.

missing.description: Eligible slices not placed in sequence; empty on verdict:sequenced.

duplicated.description: Slice ids placed more than once; empty on verdict:sequenced.

sequence_counts.description: Summary counts; total and positions must be equal on clean run.

positions.description: Number of positions emitted in sequence[].
